---
title: "repeatedAnova"
output: html_document
date: "2025-01-27"
---

# By Participant 

```{r}
dat <- read.csv("response_aligned_by_subj.csv")
dat
```

```{r}
dat$subjNum  <- factor(dat$subjNum)
dat$type <- factor(dat$type)
dat$force <- factor(dat$force)

anova_result <- aov(
  response_aligned ~ type * force + Error(subjNum / (type * force)),
  data = dat
)


# Output the ANOVA table
summary(anova_result)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(effsize)
library(tidyr)

results <- list() 
for(f in levels(dat$force)) { 
  df_sub <- dat %>%
    filter(force == f) %>%
    pivot_wider(
      names_from = type,
      values_from = response_aligned
    )
  
  # Paired t-test
  ttest <- t.test(df_sub$generated, df_sub$baseline, paired = TRUE)
  
  # Cohen's d
  d_result <- cohen.d(df_sub$generated, df_sub$baseline, paired = TRUE)
  
  # Storing as a sub-list
  results[[f]] <- list(test = ttest, cohen_d = d_result$estimate)
}

# --- New: Apply Benjamini-Hochberg ---

# 1. Extract raw p-values
raw_ps <- sapply(results, function(x) x$test$p.value)

# 2. Extract Cohen's d values
ds <- sapply(results, function(x) x$cohen_d)

# 3. Apply BH adjustment (method = "fdr")
adj_ps <- p.adjust(raw_ps, method = "fdr")

# 4. Create a clean final table
summary_table <- data.frame(
  Category = names(raw_ps),
  T_Stat = sapply(results, function(x) x$test$statistic),
  P_Raw = raw_ps,
  P_Adj_BH = adj_ps,
  Cohen_D = ds
) %>%
  mutate(Significant = P_Adj_BH < 0.05)

print(summary_table)
```
